case_title: DARLING, HAROLD et al VS APPLEGATE, GEORGE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION FILED BY GEORGE APPLEGATE PETITIONS THIS COURT FOR A JUDGE TO HEAR THIS APPEAL AND NOT COMMISSIONER.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26725, RECORD TRANSFERRED
REMITTITUR RETURNED FROM SUPERIOR COURT
ORDER ON APPEAL OF JUDGMENT DENYING VACATION OF JUDGMENT SCA# 26725, THE COURT HEREBY DENIES THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $502.05 FILED BY DARLING, HAROLD CHERRY, HEATHER AS TO DEFENDANT APPLEGATE, GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2001 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAILING TOGEORGE APPLEGATE RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DARLING, HAROLD CHERRY, HEATHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APPLEGATE, GEORGE $502.05 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $529.05, INTEREST, PURSUANT TO CHAPTER 49 OF THE SAN FRANCISCO ADMINISTRATIVE CODE, FROM JULY 28, 1994 TO JULY 31, 2000.
